# SBD Backlog

Single place to capture deferred ideas/requirements so they don’t get lost or re-litigated inside feature specs.

## Backlog items

### BL-001 — Bundle image (auto-generated)
**Need:** Bundles should have an image.
**Preference:** Image should be auto-generated (approach TBD).
**Status:** Deferred.
**Notes:** Discuss generation approach (template collage of included book covers vs pre-designed bundle card, etc.).

### BL-002 — Bundle invalidation + Invalid Bundles admin (out-of-stock rules)
**Need:** When a book goes out of stock, bundles containing it should become invalid/inactive and be surfaced under an Invalid Bundles admin section.
**Status:** Deferred.
**Notes:** To be implemented as a dedicated feature when we take up out-of-stock/invalidation in depth.

### BL-003 — Sprint 3 / Feature 04 (deviates from WhatsApp flow)
**Need:** Feature 04 in Sprint 3 deviates from the WhatsApp reservation flow and should be handled separately.
**Status:** Deferred.
**Notes:** Do not include in current WhatsApp-flow implementation track. Take up in a separate discussion/spec later.
